steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes state that Discoglossus nigriventer was identified in Israel in 2011. The answer must include both the organism and its location — Israel — to satisfy the question's goal.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — wrong species: focuses on a different organism rather than Discoglossus nigriventer. ✗
  • Choice B — correct organism and location: names Discoglossus nigriventer and specifies it was identified in Israel. ✓
  • Choice C — omits location: describes a general concept without stating where the organism was identified. ✗
  • Choice D — location absent: includes the year 2011 but leaves out the required location. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
